transcription.text: that's the one I'm looking for I'd know that handwriting anywhere yes that handwriting means a letter from her and every time she writes and you read her words it seems as if a picture of her comes through and when you answer the same little magic goes to work every word you write with your Schaefer white dot pen lets the you come through something more vivid than even your photograph a warm expression of your personality part of the secrets in the custom fitted Schaefer point which you choose and of course this is the famous Schaefer snorkel pen so it fills full without dunking and because only the filling tube touches the ink you never have to wipe the point each time you see Schaefer's white dot on your pen you are reminded that you own the finest Schaefer's white dot snorkel pen puts the true you on paper and always when it comes to writing come to Schaefer's

metadata.title: Sheaffer Snorkel Pen "Get in touch with Sheaffer"
